entries.surface: REST binding, OpenAPI schema, validation, and stable error envelope
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: use the stable rest.ErrorResponse envelope and OpenAPI golden evidence before publishing generated REST APIs
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: pin the previous generated REST output when runtime binding and OpenAPI schema drift

entries.surface: generated production service scaffold and cross-version generation fixtures
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: run the generated version compatibility matrix before adopting new scaffold output
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: regenerate with the previous gofly binary when repeat generation or diff explanation fails

entries.surface: release evidence, readiness score, checksums, SBOM, provenance, security, race, and benchmark reports
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: inspect docs/releases/evidence-consumption.json before upgrading or mirroring release artifacts
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: block promotion and pin the previous release when evidence is missing or readiness is not ready

entries.surface: Helm, Kustomize, ServiceMonitor, HPA, PDB, and NetworkPolicy deployment assets
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: render the production profile and review policy fallback status before applying to a cluster
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: keep the previous deployment manifest when rendered policy assets are missing or fallback status is unexpected

entries.surface: rpc, gateway, resolver, balancer, stream governance, and Kitex coexistence boundaries
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: treat RPC Tier 1 adoption as conditional until stream benchmarks, resolver smoke, and rollback notes pass locally
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: keep existing Kitex or gRPC-Go clients on latency-critical paths when boundary evidence is incomplete

entries.surface: plugin registry, third-party template contract, digest, signature, permission, and failure isolation
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: publish plugins only after digest, signature, least-permission, compatibility, and no-partial-write checks pass
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: disable the plugin or pin the previous protocol when digest, permission, or compatibility checks fail

entries.surface: AI manifest project templates and generated old/current/future profile trust matrix
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: verify template purpose, generated-output guarantees, dependency boundary, and profile rollback notes before using automation
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: use dry-run output and keep the previous generated snapshot when trust metadata drifts

entries.surface: operator symptom drills for health, metrics, trace correlation, resilience, control-plane drift, and rollback decisions
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: run the relevant drill before changing runtime policy or release promotion decisions
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: hold rollout when the expected observation or rollback path is missing from the drill evidence

entries.surface: RPC latency budgets and benchmark trend evidence
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: treat latency trends as review evidence until a budget is promoted to blocking with enough samples
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: avoid making release claims from single-run latency data

entries.surface: gofly versus Gin, Echo, Fiber, Hertz, and Kitex benchmark comparisons
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: use benchmark evidence as directional trend data unless regression budgets are explicitly blocking
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: remove or downgrade claims that are not backed by repeatable local evidence

entries.surface: release readiness, security, race, benchmark, checksum, SBOM, and provenance gates
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: do not publish or promote when release evidence consumption marks a required artifact or gate missing
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: pin the previous release and require a new evidence manifest before retrying promotion

entries.surface: generated project diff categories that delete files, rename public symbols, or change JSON/OpenAPI/proto/config contracts
entries.recommendedAdopterAction: treat breaking-candidate diffs as release blockers unless a version boundary and migration note exist
entries.rollbackOrEscalation: restore the previous generated project snapshot and block the generator upgrade
